# usageregistry_records Data Source

Lists usage records by either target or consumer. Configure exactly one `target` or `consumer` block.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "usageregistry_records" "repository" {
  consumer {
    type = "repository"
    id   = "https://git.projectbro.com/Devops/example-service"
  }
}

data "usageregistry_records" "vault_secret" {
  target {
    type = "vault_secret"
    id   = "kv/secret-source/common/db"
  }
}

output "repository_usage_record_ids" {
  value = data.usageregistry_records.repository.ids
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `consumer` (Block, max 1) Consumer to search from. Conflicts with `target`.
- `target` (Block, max 1) Target resource to search from. Conflicts with `consumer`.

### Read-Only

- `ids` (List of String) Stable usage record identifiers.
- `records` (Attributes List) Matching usage records.

### Nested Schema for `target`

Required:

- `id` (String) Provider-defined target identifier. Must not contain `#`.
- `type` (String) Target type name. Must not contain `#`.

### Nested Schema for `consumer`

Required:

- `id` (String) Provider-defined consumer identifier. Must not contain `#`.
- `type` (String) Consumer type name. Must not contain `#`.

### Nested Schema for `records`

Read-Only:

- `annotations` (Map of String) Additional string annotations stored with the usage record.
- `consumer` (Attributes) Consumer using the target.
- `created_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the record was created.
- `id` (String) Stable usage record identifier.
- `target` (Attributes) Target resource being used.
- `updated_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the record was last updated.
- `version` (Number) DynamoDB-backed record version.

### Nested Schema for `records.target`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String) Action performed against the target.
- `id` (String) Provider-defined target identifier.
- `type` (String) Target type name.
- `version` (String) Target-specific version, or `latest` when no version was provided.

### Nested Schema for `records.consumer`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Provider-defined consumer identifier.
- `type` (String) Consumer type name.
